recommendations.title: The Kid
recommendations.overview: A tramp cares for a boy after he's abandoned as a newborn by his mother. Later the mother has a change of heart and aches to be reunited with her son.

recommendations.title: City Lights
recommendations.overview: A tramp falls in love with a beautiful blind flower girl. His on-and-off friendship with a wealthy man allows him to be the girl's benefactor and suitor.

recommendations.title: The Great Dictator
recommendations.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Life
recommendations.overview: The Tramp and his dog companion struggle to survive in the inner city.

recommendations.title: Pay Day
recommendations.overview: A bricklayer and his wife clash over his end-of-the-week partying.

recommendations.title: A Day's Pleasure
recommendations.overview: A father takes his family for an outing, which turns out to be a ridiculous trial.

recommendations.title: Modern Times
recommendations.overview: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong time..

recommendations.title: One A.M.
recommendations.overview: A drunken homeowner has a difficult time getting about in his home after arriving home late at night.

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.
